name: Dowsing Fusion
name_jp: ダウジング・フュージョン
desc: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing Fusion Materials listed on it from your GY. Only Pendulum Monsters can be used as Fusion Material for this card's effect. You can only activate 1 "Dowsing Fusion" per turn.
eff: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing Fusion Materials listed on it from your GY. Only Pendulum Monsters can be used as Fusion Material for this card's effect. You can only activate 1 "Dowsing Fusion" per turn.

action: Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
Can only use certain Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon
